prompt_text:
### Demographics: 56-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Normal
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 57.1 kg; Height 168.2 cm; BMI 20.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 133/72 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.0%; 9 months ago 8.6%; 6 months ago 8.2%; 3 months ago 7.8%; current 6.9%), FPG (12 months ago 190mg/dL; 9 months ago 186mg/dL; 6 months ago 208mg/dL; 3 months ago 208mg/dL; current 168mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 57.7kg; 9 months ago 60.1kg; 6 months ago 58.7kg; 3 months ago 58.2kg; current 57.1kg), Height (12 months ago 168.2cm; 9 months ago 168.2cm; 6 months ago 168.2cm; 3 months ago 168.2cm; current 168.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 133mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 136mmHg; 3 months ago 137mmHg; current 133mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 74mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 72mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 11U/L; current 16U/L), AST (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 8U/L; 6 months ago 9.0U/L; 3 months ago 8.0U/L; current 14U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 6.8mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 5.5mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 4.8mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 6.7mL/min/1.73m²; current 4mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 816mg/g; 9 months ago 544mg/g; 6 months ago 535mg/g; 3 months ago 785mg/g; current 666mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 81mg/dL; 9 months ago 81mg/dL; 6 months ago 86mg/dL; 3 months ago 81mg/dL; current 84mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 41mg/dL; 6 months ago 38mg/dL; 3 months ago 38mg/dL; current 39mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 116mg/dL; 9 months ago 129mg/dL; 6 months ago 117mg/dL; 3 months ago 116mg/dL; current 124mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 10.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.94 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
